questions.question: Describe the difference between direct mapping and indirect mapping in a cache memory. Provide an example to illustrate your answer.
questions.hint: Explain the advantages and disadvantages of each mapping technique

questions.question: What is the purpose of a tag in a cache memory? Explain how it helps in reducing the number of cache misses.
questions.hint: Focus on the cache hierarchy level

questions.question: Compare and contrast 2-way set-associative mapping with 4-way set-associative mapping. Which one is more suitable for a high-performance cache memory?
questions.hint: Consider the trade-off between cache hit ratio and cache miss penalty
